content:
# Volcaniclastics

**Summary**: Sedimentary rocks or sediments composed of fragments of volcanic origin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] studied the mineralogical and elemental variability of Merapi volcaniclastics.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] Used to study the transport and sorting of volcanic materials in various environments as analogs for Mars.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] Quantified via XRD and XRF analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Merapi volcaniclastics are dominated by plagioclase feldspars (albite and anorthite) and pyroxenes. ([[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022, p. 15]])
